label: Global world draw layer
description: Defines a global world draw layer. The worldDrawLayer class is instantiated at startup to render a persistent visual layer over the world map.

worldDrawLayer.label: World draw layer
worldDrawLayer.description: C# WorldDrawLayerBase subclass instantiated to render this global world layer. Value is a class name resolved by the runtime.

new-global-world-draw-layer.label: New global world draw layer
new-global-world-draw-layer.description: Global world draw layer with a renderer class.
